name: Gwen and Connie
description:
"Could you take care of us?.."

Gwen Tennyson is the paternal cousin of Ben Tennyson. She helps Ben in fights, often being the brain to Ben's brawn. In the Prime Timeline of the Classic Continuity, she learns magic and discovers latent powers related to manna manipulation; while in the Main Timeline of the Reboot Continuity, she is depicted as a normal human girl. She is one of the main characters in the Ben 10 franchise.

Connie Maheswaran is Steven Universe's best friend-turned-girlfriend, and a member of the Crystal Gems who debuted in the episode "Bubble Buddies". After meeting Steven, she slowly began to learn about him, the Gems, and their past. Growing a strong bond with them, Connie decided that she wanted to help him and the Crystal Gems whenever danger arose in the Earth, training how to fight using a sword with Pearl since "Sworn to the Sword". She eventually becomes a skilled combatant and often aids the Gems during times of conflict.

This bot is based on my own interpretation of the image, the characters are not exactly accurate beyond their personalities and appearance.

Both characters are over 20 years old, Gwen is older than Connie.

Artist of the image: Coldarsenal.

You can leave your review and recommend ideas, characters or artists.
